title: Single-View Seafloor Recovery from Imaging Sonar via Differentiable Rendering
authors: Sevan Brodjian; Michael Hobley; Pietro Perona
venue: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops
summary_cn: 从单张前视成像声呐图像中，通过可微声呐渲染恢复海底高度场，强调无需训练数据的物理反演。
why_include_cn: 直接对应成像声呐、可微渲染与物理约束三维重建，是声学反演和可微 forward model 方向的高相关论文。
download_note: CVF open-access paper and PDF are available.

title: Towards Versatile Opti-Acoustic Sensor Fusion and Volumetric Mapping
authors: Ivana Collado-Gonzalez; John McConnell; Brendan Englot
summary_cn: 融合单目相机与双声呐进行水下体素/体积建图，用声学稳健性补视觉在低能见度环境下的不足。
why_include_cn: 虽然目前仅核验到 arXiv 版本，但主题直接落在声光/相机-声呐融合与复杂环境三维建图上，适合作为高相关候选方向。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.

title: A Sonar-Visual Dataset for Cross-Modal Underwater Robot Perception
authors: Weitung Chen; Phil Tinn; Per Gunnar Auran; Martin Ludvigsen; Peter Halland Haro
summary_cn: 发布水下声呐-视觉配对数据集 SOVIS，用于跨模态感知、声呐预测与水下机器人任务。
why_include_cn: 数据集本身不是成像算法，但对声学-视觉融合、跨模态监督和真实水下数据设计有直接参考价值。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.

title: SonarSweep: Fusing Sonar and Vision for Robust 3D Reconstruction via Plane Sweeping
authors: Lingpeng Chen; Jiakun Tang; Apple Pui-Yi Chui; Ziyang Hong; Junfeng Wu
summary_cn: 提出 SonarSweep，将经典 plane sweep 思路改造为声呐-视觉跨模态融合框架，用于低能见度水下环境的鲁棒密集三维重建。
why_include_cn: 直接对应 camera-sonar fusion 与水下三维重建；arXiv v2 于 2026-05-18 更新，属于应持续跟踪的近期高相关工作。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.

title: Bathymetric Surveying with Imaging Sonar Using Neural Volume Rendering
authors: Yiping Xie; Giancarlo Troni; Nils Bore; John Folkesson
summary_cn: 用神经体渲染和可微声呐模型从前视成像声呐数据中恢复海底地形，并联合估计声呐波束模式。
why_include_cn: 直接对应神经声学重建、可微声呐 forward model 与自监督三维几何恢复，是成像声呐神经渲染方向的重要近作。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.

title: Neural Implicit Surface Reconstruction using Imaging Sonar
authors: Mohamad Qadri; Michael Kaess; Ioannis Gkioulekas
summary_cn: 用神经隐式表面表示和可微体渲染来拟合前视成像声呐观测，实现密集三维表面重建。
why_include_cn: 这是 AONeuS 等声光融合神经渲染工作的前置声学分支，对理解声呐 forward model、隐式几何和可微重建非常有启发。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.

title: SH-SAS: An Implicit Neural Representation for Complex Spherical-Harmonic Scattering Fields for 3D Synthetic Aperture Sonar
authors: Omkar Shailendra Vengurlekar; Adithya Pediredla; Suren Jayasuriya
summary_cn: 用球谐系数表示合成孔径声呐中的复声学散射场，直接从一维 ToF 信号训练隐式神经场，以建模各向异性散射并提升三维 SAS 重建质量。
why_include_cn: 这是成像声呐/合成孔径声呐与 neural field、可微声学 forward model 的直接交叉，且已解析到 3DV 2026 final-version 记录，适合作为 core 收录。
download_note: Crossref/DOI final-version metadata was resolved by the updater; arXiv preprint and PDF are available.

title: A 240-Element Matrix Probe With Aberration Mask for 4-D Carotid Artery Computational Ultrasound Imaging
authors: Yuyang Hu; Michael Brown; Didem Dogan; Mahé Bulot; Maxime Cheppe; Guillaume Ferin; Geert Leus; Antonius F. W. van der Steen; Pieter Kruizinga; Johannes G. Bosch
venue: IEEE Transactions on Ultrasonics, Ferroelectrics, and Frequency Control
summary_cn: 提出带空间编码/aberration mask 的 240 阵元矩阵探头，用模型驱动重建改善 4D 颈动脉超声成像，是声学编码成像硬件与反演结合的代表性系统工作。
why_include_cn: 主题直接落在 acoustic coded imaging 和 computational ultrasound，但偏医学超声系统而非声光融合主线，因此建议作为 related 收录。
download_note: Crossref/DOI final-version metadata was resolved by the updater; arXiv preprint and PDF are available.

title: GPAIR: Gaussian-Kernel-Based Ultrafast 3D Photoacoustic Iterative Reconstruction
authors: Yibing Wang; Shuang Li; Tingting Huang; Yu Zhang; Chulhong Kim; Seongwook Choi; Changhui Li
summary_cn: 提出 GPAIR，用连续各向同性 Gaussian kernel 表示 3D PACT 体素，并推导解析压力波表达与 GPU/Triton 可微算子，实现大规模 3D photoacoustic iterative reconstruction 的显著加速。
why_include_cn: 直接对应 photoacoustic imaging reconstruction 和声学反演计算框架，尤其适合跟踪可微/神经化 3D 光声重建方向。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.

title: Sub-acoustic resolution photoacoustic imaging through scattering layers using speckle correlations
authors: Benjamin Keenlyside; Arnon A. B.; Dylan Marques; Ivo Vellekoop; James Guggenheim
summary_cn: 利用相干散射光产生的 speckle pattern correlation 与 photoacoustic detection，在声学选通区域内恢复光学分辨率图像，实现穿过散射层的 sub-acoustic-resolution photoacoustic imaging。
why_include_cn: 这是光学散射、speckle correlation 与光声成像的直接交叉，贴合 acoustic-optics imaging 与 photoacoustic super-resolution 主线。
download_note: No final venue was verified at the time of curation; arXiv is recorded as the preprint source.

title: SlingBAG: point cloud-based iterative algorithm for large-scale 3D photoacoustic imaging
authors: Shuang Li; Yibing Wang; Jian Gao; Chulhong Kim; Seongwook Choi; Bowen Zhang; Qian Chen; Yao Yao; Changhui Li
summary_cn: 提出 SlingBAG，把大规模 3D photoacoustic 场景表示为可自适应增删/分裂的 Gaussian ball 点云，显著降低传统迭代重建的内存和时间开销。
why_include_cn: Nature Communications final-version；主题直接对应 3D photoacoustic reconstruction、连续/点云表示和可扩展迭代反演，是光声成像算法主线核心论文。
download_note: Nature Communications DOI/final-version metadata was resolved through the repository candidate tracker; arXiv preprint is also available.

title: Acoustic Resolution Photoacoustic Microscopy Imaging Enhancement: Integration of Group Sparsity With Deep Denoiser Prior
authors: Zhengyuan Zhang; Zuozhou Pan; Zhuoyi Lin; Arunima Sharma; Chia-Wen Lin; Manojit Pramanik; Yuanjin Zheng
summary_cn: 将 group sparsity 与 deep denoiser prior 结合，用于 acoustic-resolution photoacoustic microscopy 的图像增强/反演，属于模型先验与深度先验融合的光声成像重建方向。
why_include_cn: IEEE TIP final-version，且主题直接落在 photoacoustic microscopy enhancement / reconstruction，应作为光声成像算法主线核心论文跟踪。
download_note: OpenAlex/DOI metadata was resolved by the repository candidate tracker.
